ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Full name of the drug */,
  "drug_name_short" TEXT /* Short name or abbreviation of the drug */,
  "indication" TEXT /* Therapeutic indication for the drug */,
  "crcl_level" TEXT /* Specific renal function criteria (CrCl level) for dosing */,
  "dose" TEXT /* Dosing instructions for the drug */,
  "crcl_cutoff_high" INTEGER /* Upper threshold of the CrCl cutoff for the dosing instructions */,
  "crcl_cutoff_low" INTEGER /* Lower threshold of the CrCl cutoff for the dosing instructions */,
  "dosing_frequency" TEXT /* Dosing frequency */,
  "dosing_unit" TEXT /* Dosing unit */,
  "crcl_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the CrCl level for dosing */,
  "special_considerations" TEXT /* Special considerations for dosing */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dosing information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pharmacist, physician, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the drug information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the drug information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the drug information */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the drug information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapeutic_indications" (
  "indication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each therapeutic indication */,
  "indication_name" TEXT /* Name of the therapeutic indication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the therapeutic indication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renal_function_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renal function criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the renal function criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the renal function criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_therapeutic_indications" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the drugs table */,
  "indication_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the therapeutic_indications table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id", "indication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_renal_function_criteria" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the drugs table */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the renal_function_criteria table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id", "criterion_id")
)
